part: E - Simulation Corpus Expansion Gate Design
expansionBlockedUntil: P26F4: MonthlyRevenue historical source imported AND post-import coverage preview PASS
PIT feature registry updated (all active scoring sources at AVAILABLE_NEEDS_VALIDATION or better)
Feature coverage threshold: >= target symbols × target asOfDates × target horizons
No outcome fields in scoring snapshot (leakage gate PASS)

expansionPolicy.frozenCorpusSeparated: Existing 60 sim-corpus-v0 entries must remain unchanged
expansionPolicy.duplicateKey: corpusEntryKey must be unique across all versions

expansionIsNotOptimizer: Expanding corpus does NOT mean running optimizer. Optimizer gate requires additional prerequisites (see PART G).
disclaimer: Paper design only. Not investment advice.
